verifications.description: PHP swiper-parent missing 'relative' and 'grid' classes that TSX has

evidence.phpLine38: class="swiper-parent relative overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1"
evidence.tsxLine244to249: cn({ 'swiper-parent relative grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1': true, 'overflow-hidden': !isSelected, 'overflow-visible pb-6 -mb-6': isSelected })
evidence.analysis: PHP now has 'relative' and 'grid' classes matching TSX. Frontend (isSelected=false) produces identical class set: swiper-parent relative overflow-hidden grid grid-cols-1 grid-rows-1. The TSX editor-only conditional (overflow-visible pb-6 -mb-6 when isSelected) is acceptable since it only applies in the editor.

verifications.description: All gallery images missing alt text

evidence.demo-img-1: alt="Demo landscape photo of campus grounds"
evidence.demo-img-2: alt="Demo portrait photo of student activities"
evidence.demo-img-3: alt="Demo nature photo of campus gardens"
evidence.analysis: All 41 images across all 13 variations now have descriptive alt text. The developer updated the alt text in the WordPress media library for the demo images (IDs 17, 18, 19).

verifications.description: aria-labelledby references non-existent heading ID when heading is empty

sectionLevel.withHeading: aria-labelledby="auto-xxx-heading" -- CORRECT, matches ThemeHeading h2 id

evidence.rootCause: theme_block_region_id() already returns 'auto-{hash}-heading' (see inc/helpers/blocks.php line 106). PHP line 38 appends another '-heading' via theme_block_region_id() . '-heading', producing 'auto-{hash}-heading-heading'. ThemeHeading sets id to just theme_block_region_id() ('auto-{hash}-heading'). The IDs do not match.
evidence.phpLine38Code: <?php echo ! empty( $heading ) ? 'aria-labelledby="' . esc_attr( theme_block_region_id() . '-heading' ) . '"' : 'aria-label="' . esc_attr__( 'Gallery Carousel', 'takt' ) . '"'; ?>
evidence.analysis: The empty-heading fallback to aria-label was correctly fixed. However, for variations WITH a heading, the swiper-parent aria-labelledby still references a non-existent ID because of the doubled -heading suffix. This affects 12 out of 13 variations.

fix.explanation: Remove the '-heading' suffix since theme_block_region_id() already appends it. The aria-labelledby value should be just theme_block_region_id() to match the id that ThemeHeading sets on the h2 element.

verifications.description: Automated a11y test runner issues (CRSL-KB-002, CRSL-BHV-001)
verifications.reason: Accepted as test harness limitations per orchestrator instructions

newIssues.description: Swiper-parent aria-labelledby has doubled '-heading' suffix, referencing non-existent element ID
newIssues.impact: The carousel region (role=region) on 12 of 13 variations references an ID that does not exist in the DOM. Screen readers will not find the accessible name for the carousel region, reducing accessibility.
newIssues.fix:
Change PHP line 38 from:
  theme_block_region_id() . '-heading'
To:
  theme_block_region_id()

This produces 'auto-{hash}-heading' which matches the id that ThemeHeading outputs on the h2 element.
newIssues.alsoUpdate: Verify GalleryCarousel.tsx line 254 uses the correct ID pattern. The TSX uses `${clientId}-heading` which is editor-only and follows a different ID scheme, so this is only a PHP fix.
